items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario 'Staff data minimization in public views', but the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results related to this scenario. The linked use case discusses booking functionalities but does not address the data minimization aspect, leading to an inconclusive status. Additionally, prior steps do not provide relevant evidence to support the expected result of the scenario validation.
